title: hymenophyllum helicoideum
intro: Hymenophyllum helicoideum, also known as the helicoid filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Hymenophyllum helicoideum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although its use is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
